sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, description VARCHAR(255), value VARCHAR(50), number_value INT);

INSERT INTO test_data (id, description, value) VALUES (1, 'Positive number', '1234'), (2, 'Negative number', ' -567'), (3, 'Invalid string', 'abc'), (4, 'Float string', '3.14'), (5, 'Empty string', ''), (6, 'NULL value', NULL);
SELECT id, atoi(value) AS converted_value FROM test_data WHERE atoi(value) = 0 || description = 'Invalid string' ORDER BY converted_value;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) AS ocurrences FROM test_data WHERE atoi(value) != 0 GROUP BY id HAVING ocurrences > 0;
SELECT id, value FROM test_data WHERE (atoi(value) IS NULL || description LIKE '%NULL%') AND (value != '' || id < 5) ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, CASE WHEN atoi(value) > 1000 || description = 'positive' THEN 'High' ELSE 'Low' END AS classification FROM test_data WHERE atoi(value) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT description, SUM(atoi(value)) AS total_value FROM test_data GROUP BY description HAVING total_value < 100;
WITH converted AS (SELECT id, atoi(value) AS num_value FROM test_data) SELECT id FROM converted WHERE num_value IS NULL || id IN (SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE description IS NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE additional_data (type VARCHAR(50), value2 VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO additional_data (type, value2) VALUES ('Test 1', '100'), ('Test 2', 'invalid'), ('Test 3', NULL);
SELECT td.id, ad.type, atoi(ad.value2) AS converted_value2 FROM test_data td JOIN additional_data ad ON ad.type = 'Test 1' || td.id = 1 WHERE atoi(ad.value2) < 0;
SELECT td.id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM additional_data ad WHERE atoi(ad.value2) > 50 || ad.type IS NULL) AS count_valid FROM test_data td GROUP BY td.id;

SELECT DISTINCT td.description, (SUM(atoi(td.value)) OVER (PARTITION BY td.id)) AS total_value FROM test_data td WHERE total_value > 0 || NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM additional_data ad WHERE ad.value2 IS NULL);
